title: Driver My Jobs View
tech: Vite, React 18, TypeScript, React Router v6, Axios, CSS Modules
keyConstraints: TypeScript strict, no UI component library, plain CSS Modules only, Axios instance already configured with auth interceptor
description: Implement the Driver jobs view. Replaces the MyJobsPage placeholder. Drivers see only their own assigned jobs. They can view job details and update status to IN_PROGRESS or COMPLETED. No create, assign or delete — read and status update only.
acceptanceCriteria: MyJobsPage fetches GET /api/jobs on mount — backend already filters to driver's own jobs via JWT
Jobs displayed as cards showing: title, status badge, scheduledAt, location, notes
Loading state while fetching, friendly empty state if no jobs assigned
Each job card has a Start Job button if status is ASSIGNED — calls PATCH /api/jobs/:id with status IN_PROGRESS
Each job card has a Complete Job button if status is IN_PROGRESS — calls PATCH /api/jobs/:id with status COMPLETED
Completed jobs still visible in list but buttons hidden and card visually dimmed
Status badges color coded same as dispatcher view: ASSIGNED=blue, IN_PROGRESS=yellow, COMPLETED=green
All API errors show a simple error message — no raw error objects
securityConsiderations: Driver must never be able to call create, delete or assign endpoints — these are blocked by RBAC on the backend, but the frontend should not even show these controls to drivers. Status update only allows IN_PROGRESS and COMPLETED transitions for drivers — do not show DRAFT option.
